## Epic 4 — Character Creation (#42)

**Dependency:** #21 (dice taxonomy), #32 (DP economy)
**Est. Effort:** Extra Large

### Goal
Design all 8 classes with their dice allocations, DP cost tables, starting abilities, and progression.

### The 8 Classes (from original, redesigned)
| # | Class | Theme | Primary Dice | Role |
|---|-------|-------|-------------|------|
| 1 | **Protector** | Tank, defender | Armor, Protection, Shields | Front-line defense |
| 2 | **Blade** | Melee striker | Blades, Axes, Polearms, Great Weapons | Damage dealer |
| 3 | **Arcanist** | Arcane spellcaster | Fire, Wind, Energy, Water, Earth | Magic artillery |
| 4 | **Shepherd** | Divine caster/healer | Protection, Animal, Energy | Support/healing |
| 5 | **Intellect** | Knowledge expert | (flexible) | Skill monkey, lore |
| 6 | **Odd** | Wildcard hybrid | (flexible) | Unpredictable |
| 7 | **Leader** | Support/buffer | Protection, Energy | Party buffs |
| 8 | **Unbalanced** | High-risk/reward | (unique) | Corruption mechanic |

### Per-Class Design Requirements
- [ ] Starting dice types (3-4 specific types)
- [ ] Class feature at level 1 (signature ability)
- [ ] DP cost table for all skills (the 1-4 cost tier for each)
- [ ] 2-3 class-exclusive talents
- [ ] Progression table (what you gain at levels 1, 3, 5, 7, 10, 15, 20)
- [ ] Narrative flavor (2 paragraphs per class)

### Tasks
- [ ] Design each class's mechanical identity
- [ ] Create progression tables
- [ ] Create starting dice allocation table
- [ ] Write class descriptions
- [ ] Balance check: no class should dominate all pillars (combat, social, exploration)
